scenarios.description: children() reuses cached empty list for element with only non-element nodes (shadowChildrenRef non-null empty branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element has one TextNode child and children() was called once to populate empty cache
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() returns same Elements instance (empty) without rebuilding
pseudocode: el.children(); // first call builds empty cached list

scenarios.description: children() rebuilds when cached shadowChildrenRef referent has been cleared (weakref-null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element has one Element child and shadowChildrenRef is manually set to a WeakReference with null referent
scenarios.expectedResult: children() rebuilds and returns a new list with one Element child
pseudocode: TEST TC11 children() rebuild on null weakref referent
// manually clear the referent via reflection
